name: Fortune Bay Corp.
summary: Fortune Bay Corp. acquires, explores for, and develops mineral properties. The company primarily explores for gold deposits. It holds a 100% interest in the Goldfields project comprises 22 mineral dispositions covering an area of approximately 10,300 hectares located in northern Saskatchewan, Canada; and the Ixhuat√É¬°n project that consists of the 4,176 hectares of Rio Negro concession located in northern Chiapas State, Mexico. The company also owns 2% net smelter royalty in the Huizopa project located in the Sierra Madres in Chihuahua, Mexico. Fortune Bay Corp. is headquartered in Halifax, Canada.
